context.narrative: NQ is in a positive gamma regime (Net GEX +810.00K of 14.02M total), where dealer hedging tends to dampen volatility and mean-revert price — buying dips, selling rallies. 0DTE gamma is negligible (~-2.4% of total), so the all-expiration structure leads. Spot 29,784.25 sits within the 30,185.40–31,121.60 session range, below the 30,660 invalidation, where the downside ladder is active. Acceptance through 30,000 opens a push toward 30,300 and the 30,550 ceiling; rejection rotates back to support, and losing 30,660 reactivates the downside ladder. Trade acceptance and failure, not direction — reactions at these levels are likely but not guaranteed.
context.zero_dte_weight: 0DTE GEX is ~-2.4% of total — all-exp levels are authoritative for this session.

decision_tree: not available holds → decision cluster 30,000 is in play
Fail at 30,000 → rotation back to not available
Lose not available → live invalidation 30,660 back in play
Trade acceptance and failure — not direction.

bullish.trigger: Hold not available + acceptance above cluster 30,000
bullish.execution: Hold + reclaim only. Scale out at each target. No chasing into overhead without acceptance.

bearish.trigger: Rejection at cluster 30,000 or loss of not available
bearish.execution: Failed-recovery short only. Do not press downside while price holds above not available.

chop.trigger: Oscillates between not available and cluster 30,000
chop.invalidation: Clean acceptance outside the range (either side)
chop.execution: Rotation / fakeouts — no directional edge. Fade extremes only. No middle-of-range entries. Size down. Wait for resolution.

management: First target: take 50–75% off. Reduce risk immediately.
Second target: scale out further. Leave a runner.
Runner: trail stop. Let the level work.
Never let a green trade go red.
Do not hold through a completed second leg unless fresh acceptance confirms continuation.
summary: Gamma regime Positive — flows may reinforce / stabilize moves (reactions likely, not guaranteed).
Directional bias from raw Net DEX: +5.59B.
Active decision cluster 30,000: acceptance opens recovery toward 30,300; failure rotates to not available and risks the 30,660 invalidation.

playbook.name: Mean-reversion — fade extremes
playbook.why: Positive gamma (+810.00K) has dealers hedging against the move (buy dips, sell rallies), dampening volatility and favouring rotation over trend.
playbook.how: Fade rejections at the 30,000 cluster; buy dips that hold support; scale toward the range midpoint. No middle-of-range entries.

playbook.name: Range rotation (value-area fades)
playbook.why: Balance between support support and the 30,000 ceiling — treat these as value-area edges.
playbook.how: Fade the extremes only, size down in the middle, wait for acceptance or a clean break to flip bias.

playbook.name: Reclaim / failed-breakdown long
playbook.why: In a stabilising regime, dips that reclaim support tend to recover toward the cluster.
playbook.how: Long on hold + reclaim of support; target the 30,000 cluster; out on losing support.

playbook.name: Acceptance-through breakout
playbook.why: Positive gamma resists breakouts, so only clean acceptance is tradeable — fewer but higher-quality continuations.
playbook.how: Long only on accepted candles above 30,000 → 30,300 → 30,550. No chasing without acceptance.

strategy_library.name: Mean-reversion (fade extremes)
strategy_library.note: Fade pushes into walls; buy dips / sell rallies; no middle-of-range entries.

strategy_library.name: Momentum / breakout
strategy_library.note: Trade accepted breakouts with trend; trail runners; do not fade.

strategy_library.name: Range rotation (VAH / VAL / POC)
strategy_library.note: Fade value-area edges; target POC; size down mid-range.

strategy_library.name: Acceptance / rejection at the decision cluster
strategy_library.note: Go with clean acceptance; fade clean rejection. Acceptance & failure, not direction.

strategy_library.name: Reclaim / failed-breakdown long
strategy_library.when: Dip reclaims support in positive gamma
strategy_library.note: Hold + reclaim long; invalidation on losing the support.

strategy_library.name: Failed-recovery short
strategy_library.when: Rejection at resistance or loss of support
strategy_library.note: Short failed pushes only; don't press while price holds above support.

strategy_library.name: Explosive-zone scalp (blind spots / LVN)
strategy_library.when: Price enters a thin / low-liquidity band
strategy_library.note: Expect a fast move through the gap; scalp the acceleration with tight risk.

strategy_library.name: VWAP reversion / trend
strategy_library.note: Fade extensions back to VWAP in balance; ride the VWAP slope in trend.

strategy_library.name: Opening-range breakout
strategy_library.note: Trade acceptance beyond the OR with the regime; fade fakeouts under positive gamma.

strategy_library.name: Liquidity sweep / stop-run reversal
strategy_library.note: Fade the sweep back into range on absorption / CLC confirmation.

strategy_library.name: Absorption / CLC entry
strategy_library.when: At a key level with delta / CVD divergence
strategy_library.note: Enter when aggressive flow is absorbed (DeepDOM / iceberg) and price holds.

strategy_library.name: Pin / theta into the close
strategy_library.note: Expect compression near the largest GEX strikes; don't force direction into the pin.

context.narrative: ES is in a negative gamma regime (Net GEX -20.13M), where dealer hedging can amplify moves and extend trends — extension risk, not a certainty. 0DTE gamma is negligible (~-0.5% of total), so the all-expiration structure leads. Spot 7,545 sits within the 7,477.92–7,604.58 session range, in the recovery zone: holding above 7,540 and pressing the 7,575–7,610 decision cluster overhead. Acceptance through 7,575–7,610 opens a push toward 7,625 and the 7,600 ceiling; rejection rotates back to 7,540, and losing 7,545 reactivates the downside ladder. Trade acceptance and failure, not direction — reactions at these levels are likely but not guaranteed.
context.zero_dte_weight: 0DTE GEX is ~-0.5% of total — all-exp levels are authoritative for this session.

decision_tree: 7,540 holds → decision cluster 7,575–7,610 is in play
Lose 7,540 → live invalidation 7,545 back in play
Trade acceptance and failure — not direction.

bullish.execution: Hold + reclaim only. Scale out at each target. No chasing into overhead without acceptance.

bearish.trigger: Rejection at cluster 7,575–7,610 or loss of 7,540
bearish.execution: Failed-recovery short only. Do not press downside while price holds above 7,540.

chop.invalidation: Clean acceptance outside the range (either side)
chop.execution: Rotation / fakeouts — no directional edge. Fade extremes only. No middle-of-range entries. Size down. Wait for resolution.

management: First target: take 50–75% off. Reduce risk immediately.
Second target: scale out further. Leave a runner.
Runner: trail stop. Let the level work.
Never let a green trade go red.
Do not hold through a completed second leg unless fresh acceptance confirms continuation.
summary: Gamma regime Negative — extension risk; flows may amplify moves (not a certainty).
Directional bias from raw Net DEX: +59.65B.
Active decision cluster 7,575–7,610: acceptance opens recovery toward 7,625; failure rotates to 7,540 and risks the 7,545 invalidation.

playbook.name: Decision-cluster acceptance / rejection
playbook.why: Price is in the recovery zone below the 7,575–7,610 fulcrum — the session resolves here.
playbook.how: Acceptance above 7,575–7,610 → long the recovery; rejection → fade back to 7,540. Trade acceptance and failure, not direction.

playbook.name: Momentum / breakout
playbook.why: Negative gamma (-20.13M) has dealer hedging amplifying moves — extensions and trends are favoured (risk, not certainty).
playbook.how: Trade breakouts of 7,575–7,610 and 7,540 in the direction of the move; let runners work; avoid fading.

playbook.name: Trend continuation
playbook.how: Add on acceptance through each level; trail stops; do not counter-trend.

playbook.name: Breakdown short — downside ladder
playbook.why: Below 7,545 the ladder activates and can accelerate.
playbook.how: Short on loss of 7,545; step through the ladder levels; cover into supports.

playbook.name: Mean-reversion / range fades
playbook.why: Fading extremes is dangerous when flows amplify — high stop-out risk.
playbook.how: Skip range fades until gamma flips positive.
